description: Truncated/partial tool-call JSON (a shape-A create_work_order cut mid-arguments, e.g. the model ran out of tokens) emitted as plain-text content. Provenance: PR #55 code review, detector-gap family (5) verified by execution -- the fragment never parses, so shape-based detection cannot return (name, args) and the payload passed both seams raw. Fixed by the finalize-only regex tripwire (_looks_like_leaked_tool_call_fragment): an UNPARSABLE payload bearing both a name key and a call-marker key is suppressed at the gate. Fail-closed per the R9/U6 trade-off; the write NEVER executes.
user_messages: create a work order for P-201
